evals.prompt: where is my money leaking? give me the full picture across all the sneaky ways money exits — subscriptions, fees, interest, anything weird. last 12 months.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive leak audit. Headline annualized total. Sections covering subscriptions, fees, interest, predatory products, gambling (if any), unintended leaks. Empty categories omitted. Hemingway voice, no moralizing, dollar costs as the unit.

evals.prompt: audit my subscriptions. how much am i paying for things i'm not using?
evals.expected_output: Subscription-focused report (the $ARGUMENTS narrowing). Total monthly + annualized. Active series sorted by cost. Zombie series flagged. Price-creep. Small-amount cluster (likely-forgotten). Bundled-billing parties (Apple/Google) noted with where to look.

evals.prompt: anything fishy in my account in the last 30 days? something feels off but i can't put my finger on it
evals.expected_output: Short-period recent-anomaly focus. Surfaces possible duplicates, unusually-large charges, new-merchant large charges, recurring price changes. Calm tone, frames findings as 'worth a second look' not 'fraud.' Covers the old /fishy use case.
